title: Reconciliation: test harness failures

deferred.reason: Requires T-41 (/ceos-agents:version-bump) — plugin.json/marketplace.json still at 6.8.1, git tag v6.9.0 not yet created

notes: All 26 real failures resolved. Primary root causes: (1) Windows Git-Bash treats strings starting with '--' or '---' as grep flags — fixed by adding '--' separator to all affected grep calls; (2) jq not available on Windows — replaced with Python json module throughout; (3) awk range patterns included header lines — fixed with {found=1; next} idiom; (4) webhook-proto-coverage parity check counted prose mentions of 'curl' not actual command invocations — fixed with anchored grep pattern.
